description_long: This is a compact, vintage-style car with a rounded, streamlined body painted in a glossy green finish. The vehicle features two doors, a small front hood, and a rear engine compartment with ventilation slats. The windows are slightly tinted, and the wheels are small with silver hubcaps and black tires. Chrome accents are visible on the bumpers, side mirrors, and door handles, adding to its classic aesthetic. The rear displays a black license plate with white text and a small badge, while the headlights are round and positioned on either side of the front grille.
description: A small, vintage green car with a rounded body, chrome accents, and two doors. It features round headlights, silver hubcaps, and a black rear license plate.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded hood, two circular headlights, a small grille, and chrome bumper.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the compact profile, two doors, tinted windows, and silver hubcaps.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the engine compartment with ventilation slats, a black license plate, and chrome bumper.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the car's compact shape, two doors, and wheel details.
attribute_headlight_design: Two round headlights, single arrangement, classic chrome bezel
